candidate.name: Sample Mid-Market AE
candidate.cvText:
Mid-Market Account Executive at Snowflake
Denver, CO
5 years quota-carrying AE; mid-market segment.

Account Executive · Snowflake · Denver, CO
- 118% quota attainment FY24, $1.2M ARR closed
- New business focus, deal cycle ownership, MEDDIC, MEDDPICC, BANT
- Discovery calls, negotiation, contract close, expansion
- Closed-won 38 net-new logos, 6-month average sales cycle
- Pipeline generation, prospecting, territory ownership, forecasting
- Tools: Salesforce, Outreach, Gong, Clari, Apollo

jobs.title: Sales Engineer
jobs.note: Cross-family (presales) — family penalty caps composite at 55.

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive — EMEA
jobs.note: Same family, cross-region onsite — location floor cap.

jobs.title: Account Executive — DACH (German-speaking)
jobs.note: Same family but missing required German language — language penalty.
